title: URGENT - Board Relation Always return NULL VALUE.

posts.author: Lwolff (Wolff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Since yesterday, all of my webhooks that were previously working fine are now returning errors. Every request involving a connected board or connected column is now returning null for all values.

This issue has completely broken my app, webhooks, and automations.

Do you have any information about what’s going on and when this issue is expected to be fixed?

Best regards,

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s a breaking change to the current version of the API.

If you’re not ready for it yet, specify API version 2025-01 or earlier.
